answers: Bitcoin is a decentralized digital currency - no bank or government controls it. Transactions are verified by a network using blockchain technology.
Crypto investing tip: only invest what you can afford to lose. Start small, research the project, use trusted exchanges (Binance, Coinbase), and HODL.
Blockchain = a digital ledger that records transactions across many computers. It's transparent, secure, and the backbone of all cryptocurrencies.
Is crypto safe? The technology is secure, but the market is highly volatile. Never invest blindly, avoid scam coins, and always use 2FA on exchanges.
